text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a field of computer science that creates machines able to think and learn like humans. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve at tasks by analysing large amounts of data instead of following fixed instructions. Deep learning, a more advanced form, uses artificial neural networks to recognise complex patterns. You already use AI every day. It powers virtual assistants on your phone, recommends videos or products online, and helps apps recognise faces in photos. While AI can be very useful, it also raises important questions about the future of work and privacy.
